title: Education and Childcare Administrators, Preschool and Daycare
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate academic or nonacademic activities of preschools or childcare centers and programs, including before- and after-school care.

tasks.text: Confer with parents and staff to discuss educational activities and policies and students' behavioral or learning problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor students' progress and provide students and teachers with assistance in resolving any problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit, hire, train, and evaluate primary and supplemental staff and recommend personnel actions for programs and services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach classes or courses or provide direct care to children.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set educational standards and goals and help establish policies, procedures, and programs to carry them out.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine the scope of educational program offerings and prepare drafts of program schedules and descriptions to estimate staffing and facility requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine allocations of funds for staff, supplies, materials, and equipment and authorize purchases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities of teachers or administrators at daycare centers, schools, public agencies, or institutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain attendance, activity, planning, accounting, or personnel reports and records for officials and agencies, or direct preparation and maintenance activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, and monitor instructional methods and content of educational, vocational, or student activity programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and interpret government codes and develop procedures to meet codes and to ensure facility safety, security, and maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and evaluate new and current programs to determine their efficiency, effectiveness, and compliance with state, local, and federal regulations and recommend any necessary modifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze survey data, regulatory information, and demographic and employment trends to forecast enrollment patterns and the need for curriculum changes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inform businesses, community groups, and governmental agencies about educational needs, available programs, and program policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write articles, manuals, and other publications and assist in the distribution of promotional literature about programs and facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit budget requests or grant proposals to solicit program funding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize and direct committees of specialists, volunteers, and staff to provide technical and advisory assistance for programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
